name: Dogmatika Genesis
name_jp: ドラグマ・ジェネシス
desc: Target 1 banished Fusion, Synchro, Xyz, or Link Monster, and 1 Effect Monster your opponent controls of the same type (Fusion, Synchro, Xyz, or Link); return that banished monster to the Extra Deck, and if you do, negate the effects of that monster your opponent controls. You can only activate 1 "Dogmatika Genesis" per turn.
eff: Target 1 banished Fusion, Synchro, Xyz, or Link Monster, and 1 Effect Monster your opponent controls of the same type (Fusion, Synchro, Xyz, or Link); return that banished monster to the Extra Deck, and if you do, negate the effects of that monster your opponent controls. You can only activate 1 "Dogmatika Genesis" per turn.

action: Returns the player's banished cards to the Extra Deck
Returns the opponent's banished cards to the Extra Deck
mst: Negates the effects of your opponent's Effect Monsters
